selections.name: She's So Sexy
selections.reason: Top class rating (89) and speed figure (95) in this field. Consistent early/presser type that fits the track bias perfectly.

selections.name: Miscreant
selections.reason: Boasts a massive 104 speed figure, though class disparity rules apply. Still a major threat from an inside draw.

selections.name: Starcourt
selections.reason: Solid class rating of 82 and capable of stalking the pace. Outside draw is the only slight knock.

selections.name: Tiz Mia
selections.reason: Classy filly (85 class rating) with enough early foot to secure a good position.

danger_horse.name: Scary Proposition
danger_horse.reason: Speed figures are inflated relative to class, but can still hit the board if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Run Bobby Run
selections.reason: Tied for top class (96) and has the tactical early speed to capitalize on the track bias.

selections.name: O G Mr. Brightside
selections.reason: Also boasts a 96 class rating and draws well inside. Should be right in the mix early.

selections.name: Little Shance
selections.reason: Strong 92 class rating and consistent speed figures make him a logical contender.

selections.name: Unbridled O'brien
selections.reason: Gets the rail advantage on a speed-favoring track. Class rating of 91 keeps him competitive.

danger_horse.name: Leavetheninetynine
danger_horse.reason: High class rating (94) but lacks the early speed typically needed to win at this distance here.

selections.name: El Muchacho Alegre
selections.reason: Elite speed (102) and class (93) combined with the rail draw makes him the clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Charleston
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (97) and massive 103 speed figure. Will be flying late.

selections.name: Tricky Tiger
selections.reason: Capable of popping a big figure (103 speed) and has the tactical speed to stay close.

selections.name: Colonel Vargo
selections.reason: Solid class (90) and speed (97). Can factor into the exotics with a clean break.

danger_horse.name: Reinvest
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and a 100 speed figure make him a dangerous pace presence.

selections.name: Water Into Wine
selections.reason: Standout class rating of 105. Should be able to clear or press effectively from the outside.

selections.name: Workstation
selections.reason: Second highest class in the race (101). A logical alternative if the top pick falters.

selections.name: Wisley
selections.reason: Class rating of 99 shows he belongs with these. Needs a good trip to upset.

selections.name: Machico Madeira
selections.reason: Inside draw and decent early speed give him a chance to hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Mobil Mission
danger_horse.reason: Class rating of 96 is respectable, but speed figures are slightly behind the top contenders.

selections.name: Tyson's Lil' Star
selections.reason: Massive class advantage (107) and top speed figure (98). Looks like a standout in this spot.

selections.name: Rogues A Plotting
selections.reason: Class rating of 102 and gets the rail. Should get a perfect ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Plum Tuff
selections.reason: Solid class (96) and has the early speed to be prominent from the jump.

selections.name: Cowgirlsluvme
selections.reason: Class rating of 97 makes him a contender for the underneath spots despite the outside draw.

danger_horse.name: Bumpkin
danger_horse.reason: Class rating of 96 and inside draw make him a threat to hit the ticket.

races.exotic_strategy: BEST BET - Golden Gap overlay. Win Bet #7, Exacta 7 / 1,6, Trifecta 7 / 1,6,9 / 1,2,6,9

selections.name: Amy's Star
selections.reason: Top class rating (92) and strong speed (90). Tactical speed fits the profile of a winner here.

selections.name: Quick Rendezvous
selections.reason: Class rating of 91 and good early foot. Should be in the thick of it turning for home.

selections.name: Queenofthebuckeye
selections.reason: Class rating of 90 and highest speed figure (92) in the field. Very dangerous.

selections.name: Come On Arlene
selections.reason: Inside draw and a class rating of 88 make her a logical inclusion in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Tierney
danger_horse.reason: Class rating of 88 and a 91 speed figure show she is capable on her best day.

selections.name: Lucky Cougar
selections.reason: Dominant class rating (101) and speed figure (100). The clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Dance My Way
selections.reason: Class rating of 93 and a strong 98 speed figure. Should get a good stalking trip.

selections.name: A Little Canela
selections.reason: Class rating of 93 and a 97 speed figure. Tactical speed makes her a major player.

selections.name: Lady Wellington
selections.reason: Gets the rail advantage and has a solid 90 class rating. Can save ground for a share.

danger_horse.name: Twilight Vision
danger_horse.reason: Has early speed (97 figure) but class rating (86) suggests she might tire late against these.

selections.name: Dr Schuster
selections.reason: Class rating of 91 and gets the rail draw going a route. Should get a perfect trip.

selections.name: Faster
selections.reason: Top speed figure (103) and class rating of 88. Will be the one to catch.

selections.name: Goshen
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (92). Outside draw is tough, but has the talent.

selections.name: Kykeon
selections.reason: Inside draw and tactical speed give him a chance to outrun his odds.

danger_horse.name: Boudin
danger_horse.reason: Speed figure of 102 is capped due to low class (82), but still a threat if he gets loose.
